attacking_style: Prefers breakaway positioning over late attacks. Shows tactical creativity by attacking on flat terrain rather than steep climbs, though lacks explosive power on gradient.
team_tactics: Limited team support visible; operates independently in breakaways, managing group politics and positioning solo without heavy domestique support.
terrain_preference: Thrives on sustained climbing efforts where engine beats pure power. Final climbs suit him better than steep punchy gradients. Vulnerable on explosive steep terrain.
vulnerability: Lacks sufficient power advantage on steep gradients. Relies on endurance over explosivity, making him susceptible to pure climbers on pitches.
key_patterns: Succeeds from breakaways rather than bunch sprints or late attacks (2 races)
Strong on final climbs when race is already selective (2 races)
Chooses tactical positioning over raw power, surviving group dynamics (2 races)
form_trajectory: positive: Won from 18-rider breakaway holding off Roglic surge, showing strong climbing endurance on final ascent
